title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: A groundbreaking tour of the mind revealing the two systems that drive how we think and decide. 5 cognitive skills.
longDescription: Nobel laureate Daniel Kahneman's masterwork reveals the two systems that shape our judgments and decisions: System 1 (fast, intuitive, emotional) and System 2 (slow, deliberate, logical). Through decades of research, Kahneman exposes the systematic errors in human thinking, from anchoring bias to loss aversion. These skills help you recognize cognitive biases in real-time, make better decisions under uncertainty, and avoid the traps that lead to poor judgment.
